hero.title: Cambridge Pacific
hero.subtitle: Cambridge Pacific is an infrastructure and real assets investment platform operating across the United States and Europe. The firm focuses on the financing and deployment of long-duration capital into the physical layer of the economy — data centers, power infrastructure, energy transition, and real assets — through secondary transactions, direct investments, and strategic advisory.

features.title: The Physical Layer
features.description: We invest in the tangible infrastructure that underpins the modern economy — data centers, power systems, energy transition, and real assets.

features.title: Long-Duration Capital
features.description: We structure and deploy capital with a long-term horizon, partnering with institutional and family-office investors who share that perspective.

features.title: Built, Not Optimized
features.description: We focus on moments of transition when durable structures must be created — not incremental improvements to existing systems.

about.title: Investing in the Future of Infrastructure & Innovation
about.content: Cambridge Pacific is an infrastructure and real assets investment platform operating across the United States and Europe. The firm focuses on the financing and deployment of long-duration capital into the physical layer of the economy — data centers, power infrastructure, energy transition, and real assets — through secondary transactions, direct investments, and strategic advisory. Based in New York and Paris, Cambridge Pacific's leadership has executed more than $4.5B in transactions across real assets, infrastructure, energy, and technology, and raised over $1.5B from sovereign wealth funds, pension systems, and global institutional investors.
